landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

faq.a: Upload a photo, describe the scene you want (car, penthouse, yacht...), and the AI generates a realistic photo or video in 30 to 90 seconds, ready to post.

faq.q: Are my photos used for anything else?
faq.a: No. Your photos are only used to generate your result - they're never shared or used to train models.
Photo generation is very reliable. Video is still under continuous improvement, so results can vary slightly from one try to the next.
Pack credits never expire. Credits included in a subscription renew every month.

faq.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a: Yes, no commitment. You can cancel anytime from the Account page.

faq.q: What platforms does it work with?
faq.a: Compatible with Snapchat, Instagram Stories, TikTok and iMessage - it's a standard photo/video export usable anywhere.

faq.q: What happens if a generation fails?
faq.a: Your credits are automatically refunded if a generation fails.

dashboard.title: Create
dashboard.subtitle: Choose the format to transform.
dashboard.photoDesc: One call. Instant result, perfect for an Insta post or a story.
dashboard.videoDesc: Two steps: first validate a reference image (0.25), then generate the video (+1 or +1.5).
dashboard.note: 0.25 credit = image or edit · +1 credit = short video (≤ 5s) from a validated image · +1.5 credit = long video (6-8s). A full video costs between 1.25 and 1.75 credits total (reference image included), plus 0.25 credit per edit requested before validation.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using FlexCheck, you agree to these terms. FlexCheck lets you transform photos into AI-generated lifestyle images and videos using the credits attached to your account.
terms.p2: You must own the rights to any photo you upload and confirm it depicts you or someone who has given you permission. You're responsible for how you use the generated content, and you agree not to use the service to create misleading, illegal, or harmful content.
terms.p3: Subscriptions and credit packs are billed through Stripe. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. Credit packs never expire; subscription credits reset each billing cycle.
terms.p4: Generated files are available for download for a limited time after creation. We recommend saving anything you want to keep.
terms.p5: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the app after a change means you accept the updated terms. Questions? Reach us at contact@flexcheck.app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We collect the information you give us when you create an account (email), the photos you upload for generation, and basic usage data needed to run the service (like credit balance and generation history).
privacy.p2: Uploaded photos and generated results are processed by our AI provider (fal.ai) solely to create your requested content, and are stored temporarily so you can download your results before they expire.
privacy.p3: Payment details are handled entirely by Stripe — we never see or store your card information.
privacy.p4: We don't sell your personal data. We only share it with the service providers strictly needed to operate FlexCheck (hosting, AI generation, payments).
privacy.p5: You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at contact@flexcheck.app.
